name: Herbed Macaroni Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Minced fresh Basil (2 teaspoons dried Basil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil; cook pasta until al dente.
2. When the pasta is done, drain it well.
3. Toss hot noodles with margarine to melt.
4. Add the other ingredients and toss to combine.
5. Garnish with broccoli florets, if desired.
Variations:
- Add sauteed mushroom slices or your choice of steamed chopped vegetables.
